## A. TONIGHT-SHIP TOP 20

Ranked by mod-impact × ship-confidence. S=small (< 2h), M=medium (2-6h), L=large (6h+).

|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **AUTH-BUG-1** | AUTH_RCA §E Change 1 | CRITICAL | S | Low | None | `popup.js:1782-1784` — wizard reads `__tokensStatus()` instead of raw local storage. 3 lines. Eliminates split-read that shows wizard for already-authed mods |
| 2 | **AUTH-BUG-2** | AUTH_RCA §E Change 2 | HIGH | S | Low | None | `popup.js:424` — surface local storage write failures with `console.error` instead of silent `catch(e){}`. 3 lines. Ends token-loss-from-silent-write-failure |
| 3 | **AUTH-BUG-3** | AUTH_RCA §E Change 3 | HIGH | S | Low | None | `modtools.js:1616` — log IDB backup write failures. 3 lines. Completes the auth recovery cascade |
| 4 | **PANEL-90PCT** | HARVEST §B row 5 | HIGH | S | None | None | `popup.css` — `.pop-stats, .pop-section, .pop-token { width:90%; margin:0 auto }`. One line. Asked 3x+, never shipped. Process indictment. **MUST SHIP TONIGHT** |

| 7 | **BAN-MACRO-2** | BUGS/01 | HIGH | S | Low | None | `modtools.js:~7538` — `vSel.change` handler: guard with `if (macroPick.value && macroPick.value !== '') return;` before overwriting `msgIn.value`. Stops violation-type change from destroying macro body |

| Maintenance buttons 4x2 grid | 2x | Current session | UNSHIPPED | One CSS rule. |

| Force Rehydrate: fix or remove | 2x | HANDOFF + current | UNSHIPPED | Recommendation is REMOVE (Option A). Auto-sync infrastructure already handles it. |

## C. BLOCKING DEPENDENCIES

```
AUTH-BUG-1 (wizard reads tokensStatus)
  └── FIRST-RUN-COLLAPSE (#15) — state must be read correctly first
  └── TOKEN-REORG (#20) — tier gating depends on reliable token state

PANEL-90PCT (#4)
  └── COLLAPSIBLE-CARDS (#19) — width must be correct before card layout

STATS-TAB-FIX (#10)
  └── COLLAPSIBLE-CARDS (#19) — stats moved inside tab wrapper before wrapping in cards

background.js modGawTimeline RPC handler
  └── ACTIVITY-TIMELINE (#17) — worker endpoint exists but has no RPC dispatcher

Migration 043 (post_author denorm)
  └── BRIGADE-DETECTOR (Wave C not yet landed, V10_V11 empty) — needs post_author column
  └── FIREHOSE/10 THREAD-COMMENTER-CONTEXT — same migration prereq

Migration 044 (brigade_alerts)
  └── BRIGADE-DETECTOR — needs the table to write alerts into

MULTILEAD Migration 032 (tier column on mod_tokens)
  └── MULTILEAD/02 POPUP-UI tier gating — can't render tier badge without worker returning tier field

Discord WEBHOOK-DM (#01)
  └── ZIP-ATTACHMENT (#02) — DM sends the R2 signed URL; URL can only exist after build uploads ZIP
  └── PS1-INSTALLER (#03) — PS1 is what the mod runs from the DM link
```

Wave ordering:
- **Wave 1 (tonight):** items 1-14 from Top 20. All are independent or have AUTH-BUG-1 as only dep. Ship as v10.3.
- **Wave 2 (next session):** items 15-20 + Brigade Detector worker (after migrations). Ship as v10.4.
- **Wave 3:** Multi-lead (migration 032 + popup tier refactor), Discord rotation (webhook-DM + R2 ZIP upload + PS1). Ship as v10.5.

## D. CONTRADICTIONS BETWEEN AGENTS

| Conflict | Agent A | Agent B | CTO Resolution |
|---|---|---|---|
| Stats div location | HARVEST §F.3 says `div.pop-stats` is at popup.html:43, outside tab gating, always visible | PANEL/01 (collapsible cards) treats stats as a normal tab section to be wrapped | HARVEST is correct — stats div is genuinely outside the tab nav. Fix is STATS-TAB-FIX (#10) first, then collapsible cards can wrap it. Do in order. |
| Force Rehydrate: keep vs remove | HARVEST §B says "fix when no token: route to Tokens tab" (keep button, fix behavior) | FORCE_REHYDRATE §D says remove it entirely (Option A) | REMOVE wins. The auto-sync infrastructure (v9.2.1/v9.2.2 `onChanged` listeners) already handles all scenarios the button was designed for. Auth-fail banner's rehydrate button handles the only case requiring manual trigger. Zero user-visible functionality lost. |
| Auth wizard guard fix | PANEL/02 §A traces the same dual-store race (correctly) | AUTH_RCA §B independently confirmed same root cause | Not a contradiction — confirmation. Both agree on the fix: wizard uses `__tokensStatus()`. AUTH_RCA specifies the exact code. Ship it. |
| FIREHOSE/02 User Similarity as sec7 vs FIREHOSE/01 Activity Timeline as sec7 | FIREHOSE/01 names itself sec7 in buildUserSections | FIREHOSE/02 also renders as a new drawer section, implicitly sec7 | Resolution: Activity Timeline is sec7 (higher signal, zero new index needed tonight), User Similarity is sec8 (requires migration 005 index). Folded into Wave 2 build order. |
| Brigade detector: Queues vs cron | FIREHOSE/04 argues against Queues for v10 (correct — rolling window, not event-driven) | V10_V11 directory is empty (agents not yet landed) — no contradiction from that side | FIREHOSE/04 wins by default. Cron + D1 + `brigade_alerts` table is the v10 approach. Queues deferred to v11 for AI scoring fan-out. |
| Maint buttons: 4x2 grid (HARVEST) vs 1x4 actions grid (PANEL/03) | HARVEST §B row 10: `.pop-maint { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr }` for maint section | PANEL/03 proposes a 1-row × 4-column grid for quick-action buttons | Different sections. HARVEST targets the maintenance button list (toggle/fix/tool buttons). PANEL/03 targets the quick-action nav row (Queue/Bans/Modmail/DR). Both can ship. PANEL/03 is M-effort and not in tonight's Top 20. |

## E. WHAT NOT TO SHIP TONIGHT

These items are fully designed but wait for tonight's Wave 1 to land first or carry higher risk.

| Item | Why it waits |
|---|---|
| **Multi-lead tier (Migration 032)** | Schema migration on mod_tokens. Safe to run but it changes auth behavior — do as a dedicated session. Worker must deploy first, then popup tier-gate refactor. |
| **Discord rotation auto-DM** | Depends on `bot_mods` index (migration 032), R2 ZIP upload endpoint (new worker code), and PS1 installer script all being correct. Three-part dependency chain — ship in one dedicated rotation session. |
| **Brigade Detector (Migration 043 + 044)** | Migrations are the blocker. Migration 043 (post_author denorm + UPDATE on all gaw_comments rows) will take real D1 time. Run after confirming Activity Timeline and Search Tab work. |
| **Stats D1 persistence (/mod/stats endpoint)** | L-effort. New worker endpoint + D1 queries. Architecturally correct but belongs in a dedicated worker session, not tonight's polish sprint. |
| **User Similarity Finder** | Needs migration 005 index (idx_gaw_comments_post_author). Create the index first, soak 24h, then ship the endpoint + drawer section. |
| **Lead Area Expansion (KPI row, cards)** | PANEL/04 design is comprehensive and correct. M-effort. Requires clean Lead tab state after TOKEN-REORG ships. Wave 2. |
| **Tard Suggester Status-Bar Accordion** | The popup version works. Moving it to the status bar is a UX upgrade, not a bug fix. Session-storage persistence design is solid. Wave 2 after the simpler panel fixes land. |
| **Hot Now Panel — Modmail section (F1)** | The ship-tonight patch (Section E of FIREHOSE/05) ships SUS + DR only. Modmail section requires async `rpcCall('modMessageInbox')` path — add in the same session but after SUS + DR are verified working. |
| **"Remove highlight feature"** | HARVEST §B row 22: needs clarification from Commander on which specific UI element. Cannot touch without identification. |
| **Ctrl+K search palette** | FIREHOSE/03 Surface 2. Popup Search Tab (Surface 1) ships tonight. Status-bar palette is stretch — same code, different mount point. |

## F. BUILD ORDER FOR OPUS

### v10.3 — Surgical fixes + popup cleanup (Tonight)

Ship all of these as a single version bump. All are independent once AUTH-BUG-1 lands first in the file.

1. `popup.js:1782-1784` — AUTH-BUG-1: wizard reads `__tokensStatus()`
2. `popup.js:424` — AUTH-BUG-2: log local storage write failures
3. `modtools.js:1616` — AUTH-BUG-3: log IDB backup write failures
4. `popup.css` — PANEL-90PCT: width:90% for panel sections
5. `popup.html + popup.js` — REHYDRATE-REMOVE: delete rehydrateBtn + handler (~55 LOC deleted)
6. `modtools.js:~7334` — BAN-MACRO-1: auto-select + body-write after custom macro save
7. `modtools.js:~7538` — BAN-MACRO-2: guard vSel.change from clobbering macro selection
8. `popup.css:910-917` — DRILL-CLEANUP: delete `::before { content: "DRILL // " }` block
9. `modtools.js:8957+, popup.html:90` — RENAME-TRIAGE: 7 string replacements
10. `popup.html` — STATS-TAB-FIX: wrap `div.pop-stats` inside a `data-tab-section="stats"` container
11. `popup.css` — MAINT-GRID: `.pop-maint { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:6px; }`
12. `popup.html:84` — CSV-TOOLTIP: add `title=` attribute to Export CSV button
13. `modtools.js:~9424` — HOVER-CLIP-FIX: re-call `positionTooltip` after async intel render

No worker deploy required for items 1-13.

14. `popup.html + popup.js + popup.css` — SEARCH-TAB: 6th popup tab wiring `/gaw/search` FTS5
    - No worker changes needed; endpoint is live
15. `modtools.js + background.js + gaw-mod-proxy-v2.js` — ACTIVITY-TIMELINE (sec7 in drawer)
    - Worker deploy required for `handleGawUserTimeline` param patch + `modGawTimeline` RPC handler
16. `modtools.js:15148 + ~9770` — HOT-NOW-PANEL: rewire SIREN click + `_showHotNowPanel()` function

Verify: load popup, confirm stats show only on Stats tab, 90% width visible, rehydrate button gone, wizard does not show for catsfive, SIREN click opens HOT NOW panel not mod log.

### v10.5 — Wave 3 (worker-heavy + migrations)

Run Migrations 043 + 044 in order:

1. Migration 043 — `ALTER TABLE gaw_comments ADD COLUMN post_author` + backfill UPDATE + compound index
2. Migration 044 — `CREATE TABLE brigade_alerts` + indexes
3. `gaw-mod-proxy-v2.js` — `brigadeTick()` + `brigadeEvaluate()` wired into `scheduled()` cron
4. 48h soak in `watching`-only mode (no Discord alerts), run calibration query
5. Enable Discord webhook path + status-bar BRIG chip extension update
6. Migration 032 — Multi-lead tier column on mod_tokens + backfill
7. Worker: `requireSeniorLeadAuth()` helper, update invitation endpoint to accept `senior_lead` tier
8. `popup.js` — `__applyTierGate()` refactor replacing `__applyLeadGate()`

---

### v10.6 — Discord Rotation + Stats D1 (separate session, lead-only)

1. `build-zip.ps1` addition — upload ZIP to R2 via `POST /admin/dist/push-zip`
2. New worker endpoint `POST /admin/dist/push-zip` (R2 write, ~30 lines)
3. New worker endpoint `POST /admin/rotation/dm-all-unrotated` (JOIN mod_tokens + bot_mods, call discordDmUser)
4. `scripts/install-gaw-modtools.ps1` — PS1 installer with E-C-G beep + clipboard log (complete spec in DISCORD/03)
5. New worker endpoint `GET /mod/stats` — three D1 queries returning 6 stat counts
6. `popup.js loadStats()` — replace local-storage reads with `rpcCall('modStats')` + local fallback on error
